---
title: "News"
description: "Research updates, publication milestones, and deployment progress."
toc: false
---

## Updates

::: {.card-list}
::: {.entry-card}
#### 2026-02 | Website upgrade and migration
The academic website moved to **shunyuwu-shaun.github.io** with structured publication pages and deployment-focused project summaries.
:::
::: {.entry-card}
#### 2025-11 | IEEE TSG paper officially indexed
`End-to-End Stochastic Predict-Then-Optimize for Cost-Efficient Water-Energy Resource Scheduling` is now online with DOI.
:::
::: {.entry-card}
#### 2025-08 | New manuscripts entered active review
Manuscripts on optimization, forecasting, and quantitative decision methods entered active submission and review cycles.
:::
::: {.entry-card}
#### 2025-05 | Applied workflow in long-run operation
Field deployment continued with stable operation and measurable energy-efficiency gains.
:::
:::

## What This Page Tracks

- Publication status transitions (under review -> accepted -> published)
- Service and collaboration milestones
- Deployment milestones in power/water domains
